name: Fly Villa: AI World Travel & Creation

reviews.review_description: It’s a great time killer when you’re just standing around maybe in line at the grocery store or waiting at the doctors office. It has a lot of really cool things to do and is very entertaining!

developer_response.body:
Hi MsAutumnDior,

We love that — Villa as the ultimate “waiting in line” escape 😄 From grocery store queues to doctor’s offices, suddenly you’re flying over mountains or exploring cities in 3D.

It looks like you haven’t clicked Enter or chosen a subscription yet, which means you’ve only seen the intro. The great news is you’re still fully eligible to unlock the complete Villa experience right now.

Here are your options:
• Start the 7-day free trial and explore everything, no charge unless you continue.
• Choose the Annual plan as your first subscription and receive $183 in free gifts ($50 in Villa Coins and $133 in AI Credits).
• Or pick the Student Plan if you want a more budget-friendly start.

Once inside, you can fly anywhere on Earth in 3D, jump between mesh and high-res panoramas, explore surreal places, create worlds with AI, own land in Galactica, and even meet friends in VR. The use cases really are wild — from quick escapes to deep dives into geography, real estate scouting, or just exploring somewhere random for fun.

After subscribing, create your free Villa web account, connect it to VR, and get another $9.99 in Villa Coins just for signing in.

If it’s already your favorite time killer, wait until you unlock the full experience 🌍🚀

reviews.review_title: Its okay but not with a subscription
reviews.review_description:
Tried the 7 day free trial. Yes it's "kinda" google earth. You can't travel at street view. Having to put your hand on your chin is uncomfortable. 


The paid subscription no matter the cost shouldn't be part of it. Make the game free or charge for it.

developer_response.body:
Hi HkRxTjBx,

Thanks for giving Villa a try and sharing thoughtful feedback so early. A few things that might help clarify:

Villa is much more than just “kinda Google Earth.” It’s actually the only *multiplayer* 3D Earth platform on Meta Quest built on full mesh—not just street view. You can fly, explore, and even meet others in real time anywhere on the planet. Street View is just one of the tools—it’s meant to complement the 3D mesh. For smoother navigation there, simply teleport to a nearby spot to continue along streets. We’ll keep working on making that more intuitive.

The “hand on chin” gesture is one of several options, and we’re actively exploring alternatives based on feedback like yours—thanks for that.

As for subscriptions: a few people dislike them (most do, because the value you get out of Annual is too big to pass). That’s why we added a no-subscription option, with those few people in mind (YOU!). After your current 7-day free trial ends, come back to Shop and look for parcels in Galactica (our in-app game for buying and building land, currently on Red Planet). Some are currently 50% off. When you buy one, you can add a 1-year access pass as a one-time purchase—no renewal, no strings attached.

And Villa isn’t just virtual travel. Subscribing unlocks:

* AI in 30+ languages (have you tried that? You'll want to take your time, there's hours and hours of exploring so if you just subscribed, there's a lot more to discover)
* AI worldbuilding with art using voice
* Supersonic flying and multiplayer meetups (for supersonic flight pull both index and middle fingers on both controllers, not just index)
* VR + Zoom hybrid meetings (create a free account for that, using email, password, and get $9.99 in Villa coins. Simply click the Sign Up button in VR and follow directions).
* Broadcasting to thousands
* A full creative toolset for 3D building, importing assets, and more

You're still early in the experience—we recommend spending a few hours to really see everything Villa has to offer. Hope you’ll give it another go once your trial ends, and thanks again for helping us improve.

developer_response.body:
Hi Dangertom,

Thank you for giving Villa a try, and for taking the time to share your thoughts. You mentioned “missing the point,” and that’s a fair perspective. Villa can be quite different from traditional apps. Let me clarify a few things that may help you get the full experience next time.

Villa isn’t a linear story or game; it’s an open-world travel and creation platform** powered by AI and real-world 3D maps. You can fly anywhere on Earth, visit in 360°, learn about places with AI, and even build or host your own worlds. It’s designed for discovery and creativity — think of it as your personal gateway to the entire planet in VR.

Regarding the visuals: Villa’s 3D maps and textures load dynamically based on internet speed, so using a fast connection (preferably with the headset near your router) greatly improves rendering speed and clarity. You’ll also see a major performance boost on Meta Quest 3, thanks to its higher processing power and memory bandwidth.

About the interface — we’re continuously improving it to make onboarding smoother and less text-heavy, with clearer guidance and layout simplification. Feedback like yours is exactly what helps us refine it further.

If you’d like to give it another go, you’re always welcome to jump right back into the free trial (yes even if you canceled, during the 7 days trial its free and testable for the period you were assigned). Once you fly by pulling both index fingers on your controllers anywhere in virtual travel -  explore, and experience Villa as it’s meant to be used - hopefully it all clicks,  and you’ll see how much you can do.

We appreciate your honesty and hope you’ll come back to  experience the trill of virtual travel 🌍🚀
